23.gl: to widen (in any direction), i.e. (intransitively) recede or (transitively) remove (literally or figuratively, of place or relation)
23.kj: (a-, be, cast, drive, get, go, keep (self), put, remove, be too, (wander), withdraw) far (away, off), loose, [idiom] refrain, very, (be) a good way (off).

23.dv: or עָוֶל; and (feminine) עַוְלָה; or עוֹלָה; or עֹלָה; from H5765 (עֲוַל);

23.kj: (begin to) build(-er), obtain children, make, repair, set (up), [idiom] surely.

23.gl: a tent (as clearly conspicuous from a distance)

24.gl: properly, a cliff (or sharp rock, as compressed); generally, a rock or boulder; figuratively, a refuge; also an edge (as precipitous)
24.kj: edge, [idiom] (mighty) God (one), rock, [idiom] sharp, stone, [idiom] strength, [idiom] strong. See also H1049 (בֵּית צוּר).

24.gl: a stream, especially a winter torrent; (by implication) a (narrow) valley (in which a brook runs); also a shaft (of a mine)
24.dv: or (feminine) נַחְלָה; (Psalm 124:4), or נַחֲלָה; (Ezekiel 47:19; Ezekiel 48:28), from H5157 (נָחַל) in its original sense;

24.gl: to place (in a very wide application)
24.kj: apply, appoint, array, bring, consider, lay (up), let alone, [idiom] look, make, mark, put (on), [phrase] regard, set, shew, be stayed, [idiom] take.

24.gl: Ophir, the name of a son of Joktan, and of a gold region in the East
24.dv: or (shortened) אֹפִיר; and אוֹפִר; of uncertain derivation;

24.gl: dust (as powdered or gray); hence, clay, earth, mud
24.kj: ashes, dust, earth, ground, morter, powder, rubbish.

24.gl: strictly a clipping, i.e. gold (as dug out)

strictly a clipping, i.e. gold (as dug out)

26.gl: at that time or place; also as a conjunction, therefore
26.kj: beginning, for, from, hitherto, now, of old, once, since, then, at which time, yet.

26.gl: to be soft or pliable, i.e. (figuratively) effeminate or luxurious

26.dv: rarely (shortened) אֱלֹהַּ; probably prolonged (emphatic) from H410 (אֵל);

27.dv: a primitive root (rather denominative from H6281 (עֶתֶר));

27.gl: a promise (to God); also (concretely) a thing promised

28.gl: a road (as trodden); figuratively, a course of life or mode of action, often adverb
28.kj: along, away, because of, [phrase] by, conversation, custom, (east-) ward, journey, manner, passenger, through, toward, (high-) (path-) way(-side), whither(-soever).

28.gl: illumination or (concrete) luminary (in every sense, including lightning, happiness, etc.)
28.kj: bright, clear, [phrase] day, light (-ning), morning, sun.

28.gl: to cut down or off; (figuratively) to destroy, divide, exclude, or decide

29.gl: an eye (literally or figuratively); by analogy, a fountain (as the eye of the landscape)

29.gl: properly, to be open, wide or free, i.e. (by implication) to be safe; causatively, to free or succor
29.kj: [idiom] at all, avenging, defend, deliver(-er), help, preserve, rescue, be safe, bring (having) salvation, save(-iour), get victory.

29.kj: abase, bring (cast, put) down, debase, humble (self), be (bring, lay, make, put) low(-er).

30.gl: the hollow hand or palm (so of the paw of an animal, of the sole, and even of the bowl of a dish or sling, the handle of a bolt, the leaves of a palm-tree); figuratively, power
30.kj: branch, [phrase] foot, hand((-ful), -dle, (-led)), hollow, middle, palm, paw, power, sole, spoon.

30.gl: properly, to be smooth, i.e. (by implication) to escape (as if by slipperiness); causatively, to release or rescue; specifically, to bring forth young, emit sparks
30.kj: deliver (self), escape, lay, leap out, let alone, let go, preserve, save, [idiom] speedily, [idiom] surely.
blameless, clean, clear, exempted, free, guiltless, innocent, quit.
